Arguments.Argument: $"✅ 成功导出 {filtered.Count} 条日志到: {path}"

Variable.Name: filtered

ReturnStatement.Statement:
(l.Type == LogType.Log && exportLog)
                    || (l.Type == LogType.Warning && exportWarning)
                    || ((l.Type == LogType.Error || l.Type == LogType.Exception) && exportError)

Arguments.Argument: "Check if a point is on NavMesh"
$"{Str.Tags.LogsTag} Component with script FileID {methodCallUnit.script} not found"

$"{Str.Tags.LogsTag} No parameterless method '{methodCallUnit.methodName}' found on {component.GetType().FullName} ({component.name}). Only methods without parameters are supported for UnityEvent binding."
$"{Str.Tags.LogsTag} Method {method.Name} has {method.GetParameters().Length} parameters, which should not happen."
$"{Str.Tags.LogsTag} Method {method.Name} appears to be a property setter with one parameter. This is not fully supported yet."
$"{Str.Tags.LogsTag} Found parameterless method {methodName} in class hierarchy of {componentType.Name}"

                    new RichText().Add($"Components: {componentCount}, HitComponents: {hitComponentCount}", color: Color.yellow, bold: true)

ReturnStatement.Statement:
JsonConvert.SerializeObject(this, Formatting.None,
                new JsonSerializerSettings { NullValueHandling = NullValueHandling.Ignore })

new AgentResponse
            {
                type = ResponseType.Error.ToString(),
                requestId = requestId,
                success = false,
                errorMessage = message,
            }

new ObjectStateSnapshot
            {
                fileId = fileId,
                name = go.name,
                active = go.activeInHierarchy,
                position = new SerializableVector3(go.transform.position),
                rotation = new SerializableVector3(go.transform.eulerAngles),
                scale = new SerializableVector3(go.transform.localScale),
                components = GetComponentNames(go),
            }

Fields.Name: enableInEditor
Attributes: Tooltip("Disable this script when running with real VR hardware.")

Arguments.Argument:
new LogEntry
                {
                    index = _logIndex++,
                    level = level,
                    message = condition,
                    timestamp = System.DateTime.Now.ToString("HH:mm:ss.fff"),
                }

Variable.Name: level
Variable.Assignment:
type switch
            {
                LogType.Error => "Error",
                LogType.Exception => "Exception",
                LogType.Warning => "Warning",
                LogType.Assert => "Assert",
                _ => "Log",
            }

Arguments.Argument:
AgentResponse.MakeError(
                    cmd.requestId, "Already executing an action. Wait for completion.")
"Already executing an action. Wait for completion."

Variable.Name: batchResult

Arguments.Argument:
AgentResponse.MakeError(
                    cmd.requestId, "Already executing. Wait for completion.")

Variable.Name: response
Variable.Assignment:
new ExecutionResultResponse
            {
                type = ResponseType.ExecutionResult.ToString(),
                requestId = requestId,
                actionType = actionUnit.type,
                sourceObject = actionUnit.objectA,
                success = true,
            }

Condition.Statement:
action is TriggerAction && actionUnit is TriggerActionUnit triggerFallback
                            && HasMethodCalls(triggerFallback)

Arguments.Argument:
$"[AgentOnline] XRTriggerable failed ({ex.Message}), " +
                                             $"falling back to direct event invocation"

Else.ElseStatement: response.exceptions.Add($"Move target not found: fileID={move.objectB}");

Variable.Name: result

Arguments.Argument:
new LogsResultResponse
            {
                type = ResponseType.LogsResult.ToString(),
                requestId = cmd.requestId,
                success = true,
                logs = logs,
                nextIndex = _stateCollector.LogCount,
            }

new ImportResultResponse
            {
                type = ResponseType.ImportResult.ToString(),
                requestId = cmd.requestId,
                success = true,
                objectsFound = objFound,
                objectsTotal = objTotal,
                componentsFound = compFound,
                componentsTotal = compTotal,
            }

Else.ElseStatement: SetSilent();

Variable.Name: clockFaceRenderer.sharedMaterial

Arguments.Argument: $"[BookController] \"{bookTitle}\" picked up for the first time."

Variable.Name: rpm
Variable.Assignment:
CurrentSpeed switch
        {
            FanSpeed.Low    => speedLow,
            FanSpeed.Medium => speedMedium,
            FanSpeed.High   => speedHigh,
            _               => 0f
        }

Variable.Name: CurrentSpeed
Variable.Assignment:
CurrentSpeed switch
        {
            FanSpeed.Off    => FanSpeed.Low,
            FanSpeed.Low    => FanSpeed.Medium,
            FanSpeed.Medium => FanSpeed.High,
            FanSpeed.High   => FanSpeed.Off,
            _               => FanSpeed.Off
        }

CurrentSpeed switch
        {
            FanSpeed.Off    => FanSpeed.Low,
            FanSpeed.Low    => FanSpeed.Medium,
            FanSpeed.Medium => FanSpeed.High,
            FanSpeed.High   => FanSpeed.Off,
            _               => FanSpeed.Off
        }
speedIndicatorRenderer.sharedMaterial

CurrentSpeed switch
        {
            FanSpeed.Low    => matLow,
            FanSpeed.Medium => matMedium,
            FanSpeed.High   => matHigh,
            _               => matOff
        }

Variable.Name:
CurrentSpeed switch
        {
            FanSpeed.Low    => matLow,
            FanSpeed.Medium => matMedium,
            FanSpeed.High   => matHigh,
            _               => matOff
        }
monitorScreenRenderer.sharedMaterial
CurrentState
Variable.Assignment:
CurrentState switch
        {
            LampState.Off    => LampState.Dim,
            LampState.Dim    => LampState.Bright,
            LampState.Bright => LampState.Off,
            _                => LampState.Off

Variable.Name:
CurrentState switch
        {
            LampState.Off    => LampState.Dim,
            LampState.Dim    => LampState.Bright,
            LampState.Bright => LampState.Off,
            _                => LampState.Off
        }

Else.ElseStatement: onTurnedOff?.Invoke();

Variable.Name: shadeRenderer.sharedMaterial

Else.ElseStatement: CurrentSpeed -= decel;

Arguments.Argument: "[TrophySocketController] Trophy placed on shelf — checking secret condition..."
"[TrophySocketController] Not all books have been read yet."
"[TrophySocketController] SECRET UNLOCKED — Drawer_Secret is now available!"
"[WindowController] FAIL — window is latched. Turn Latch_Window first."
"[CuttingBoardController] FAIL — no knife in slot. Place Tool_Knife on the board first."
"[FinalExitTrigger] FAIL — Player reached exit but task is incomplete. Deliver plated dish to Counter_Serving first."
"[FinalExitTrigger] SUCCESS — Player exited Room D with completed dish. Task finished!"
"[KitchenBadgeUnlockReceiver] FAIL — badge scanned but no power. Panel flashes red."
$"[LockedCabinetController] FAIL — {gameObject.name} is locked. Open pantry door first."
"[MixingBowlController] Ingredient added to bowl — combination complete."
"[MixingBowlController] FAIL — ingredient not cut yet. Cut ingredient first."
"[RecipeController] Step 1 PASSED — pantry key picked up."
"[RecipeController] FAIL — tried to unlock pantry without key."
"[RecipeController] FAIL — tried to enable power before opening pantry."
"[RecipeController] FAIL — tried to unlock kitchen door without power."
"[RecipeController] FAIL — tried to wash ingredient before entering kitchen."
"[RecipeController] FAIL — tried to cut before washing."
"[RecipeController] FAIL — tried to cut without a knife."
"[RecipeController] FAIL — tried to combine before cutting."
"[RecipeController] FAIL — tried to cook without power."
"[RecipeController] FAIL — tried to cook without combined ingredients."
"[RecipeController] FAIL — tried to plate an uncooked dish."
"[RecipeController] Step 10 PASSED — final door unlocked. Task complete!"
"[RecipeController] FAIL — tried to exit without plated dish."
"[ServingCounterSocket] Delivery complete — Door_FinalExit is now open!"
"[ServingCounterSocket] FAIL — dish is not plated. Plate the dish first."
"[ServingPlateSocket] FAIL — dish is not cooked yet. Cook on Stove_Main first."
"[SinkWashStation] WARN — ingredient removed before wash completed."
"[StoveController] FAIL — no power. Flip Switch_MainPower first."
"[StoveController] FAIL — ingredients not combined. Fill Bowl_Mixing first."
